pst.title: REFORM PATHFINDER
pst.headline: How can you help?
pst.subtitle: The goal is to break the Private Systemic Tension — the game where both parties profit while the system they depend on degrades. Pick your country. Pick your sector. Find out which axiom breaks — and what you do to break it.
pst.globalLossLabel: Annual welfare destruction across 61 domains and 190 countries
pst.globalLossExplain: Calibrated welfare betas across 61 domains — from firearms (welfare beta of 51) to gig economy platforms (welfare beta of 0.76) — produce $85.3 trillion in annual system welfare destruction. That is the gap between what the global economy produces and what it actually delivers to the people and systems it depends on. Every welfare-destroying game converted to a sustainable one closes part of that gap. This tool maps the institutional pathway for each country and sector.
pst.fastestPathIn: In {{country}}'s {{sector}} sector, the fastest path is breaking
pst.whatYouCanDo: WHAT YOU CAN DO — BY LEVEL
pst.expandingText: 190 countries mapped from the welfare-adjusted GDP database. Every country's fastest path to reform. If you have expertise in a jurisdiction not listed — regulatory frameworks, whistleblower statutes, sector-specific agencies — contribute to make this tool better.
pst.selfLacerationText: This tool provides general guidance based on publicly available regulatory frameworks. It is not legal advice. Whistleblower statutes, enforcement mechanisms, and protection levels vary by jurisdiction and change over time. Before taking action — especially at Level 1 — consult a qualified attorney in your jurisdiction. The institutional infrastructure listed may be incomplete, out of date, or unenforced. Where data is missing, the tool says so. That honesty is itself a finding: the absence of a whistleblower statute IS the gap.

1.name: Overlapping Interests
1.desc: Both parties benefit from cooperating. There is a deal to be made.

2.name: System Independence
2.desc: System welfare W cannot be computed from party payoffs.

3.name: System Dependence
3.desc: Agent activity affects the shared system.

insider.label: INSIDER / WHISTLEBLOWER
insider.desc: You are inside the system. You break Axiom 2 from within.

plaintiff.label: PLAINTIFF / LITIGANT
plaintiff.desc: You break Axiom 2 via discovery. You weaken Axiom 1 via liability.

regulator.label: REGULATOR / AGENCY
regulator.desc: You break Axiom 2 via disclosure mandates.

legislator.label: LEGISLATOR / POLICY MAKER
legislator.desc: You break Axiom 1 (ban/cap) or Axiom 2 at statutory level.

investor.label: INVESTOR / CAPITAL ALLOCATOR
investor.desc: You break Axiom 1 via βW stranded-asset repricing.

supranational.label: SUPRANATIONAL BODY / TREATY
supranational.desc: You enable cross-jurisdictional Coasian and Pigouvian correction.
